html:
Exclusive to:

“Merm will treat the wearer like a merm.”

-

The Clever Disguise is a character-specific Hat Item exclusive to Wurt in Don't Starve Together. It is crafted in the Clothing Filter and Survivor Items Filter using one Freshwater Fish, one Cut Reeds, and two Twigs.

Wearing the Clever Disguise allows a player to be considered a Merm by other Merms, King of the Merms and Bunnymen (allowing Webber and Wortox to not be attacked on sight by Bunnymen). It allow to tame Merms (not Loyal Merm Guards) and fill some Wurt structures such as Communal Kelp Dish, Armermry and Shoddy Tool Shed.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Clever Disguise skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between April 2, 2025 and some days after it.
Loyal
Fool's Collection
Suspectacles
So so incognito!

Trivia

  • The Clever Disguise was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Wurt Character Update.
  • Much like its counterpart for Webber in the Hamlet DLC, the Shamlet Mask, the design of the Clever Disguise appears to be based on Groucho glasses.

"mermhat"
“Finally, I can show my face in public.”
–Wilson
“Yuck, who'd want a face like that?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will be biggest and strongest fish man!”
–Wolfgang
“We all hide behind our own masks...”
–Wendy
“WARTY CONCEALMENT”
–WX-78
“I'm not eager to test out its effectiveness.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not sure it'll fit over my luxurious beard.”
–Woodie
“This seems rather... fishy.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a deceitful mask.”
–Wigfrid
“Hopefully they don't notice the extra legs.”
–Webber
“Mon dieu, must I dress as a frog?”
–Warly
“Glub Glub pretend face”
–Wormwood
“Do I look a little green around the gills? Ha!”
–Winona
“Some would call me two-faced, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Make scale-less look like friendly Mermfolk!”
–Wurt
“Now I can disguise myself as a bog monster! The tables have turned!”
–Walter
“It's not terribly hard to outwit those scaly creatures.”
–Wanda
“Merm will treat the wearer like a merm.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Clever Disguise là Vật phẩm Mũ dành riêng cho nhân vật dành riêng cho Wurt trong Don't Starve Together. Nó được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc quần áo và Bộ lọc vật phẩm sống sót bằng cách sử dụng một Cá nước ngọt, một Lau sậy đã cắt và hai Cành cây.

The tables have turned! |wanda = It's not terribly hard to outwit those scaly creatures. |choose= wurt}} {{Scrapbook Info|Merm will treat the wearer like a merm.}} The '''Clever Disguise''' is a [[:Category:Character-Specific|character-specific]] [[:Category:Hats|Hat]] [[Item]] exclusive to [[Wurt]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is crafted in the [[Clothing Filter]] and [[Survivor Items Filter]] using one [[Freshwater Fish]], one [[Cut Reeds]], and two [[Twigs]]. Wearing the Clever Disguise allows a player to be considered a [[Merm]] by other Merms, [[King of the Merms]] and [[Bunnyman|Bunnymen]] (allowing Webber and Wortox to not be attacked on sight by Bunnymen). It allow to tame [[Merm]]s (not [[Loyal Merm Guard]]s) and fill some [[Wurt]] structures such as [[Communal Kelp Dish]], [[Armermry]] and [[Shoddy Tool Shed]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Clever Disguise''' skin was awarded for playing Don't Starve Together between April 2, 2025 and some days after it.
